sentences.arabic: اشْتَرَى عَلِيٌّ خَرِيطَةَ الْمَدِينَةِ مِنَ الدُّكَّانِ.
sentences.translation: Ali je kupio mapu grada u prodavnici.
sentences.translationEn: Ali bought a map of the city from the shop.

sentences.translation: Otvorio je mapu i tražio muzej.
sentences.translationEn: He opened the map and looked for the museum.

sentences.translation: Pronašao je put i hodao pouzdano.
sentences.translationEn: He found the way and walked with confidence.

sentences.translation: Stigao je do muzeja i ušao radosno.
sentences.translationEn: He reached the museum and entered with joy.
